merged.summary_one_sentence: A tile-puzzle game where the player drags shapes onto an 8x8 grid to clear lines and rack up combos.
merged.defining_hook: Pre-shaped pieces tray, drop on grid, simultaneous horizontal+vertical line clears for combo bonuses.

game_identity.visual_style: Casual chocolate-and-candy aesthetic, soft-shaded blocks, brown background

gameSpec.core_loop_one_sentence: Drag tray shapes onto an 8x8 grid; clearing rows or columns scores points.
gameSpec.defining_hook: Pre-shaped pieces tray, drop on grid, simultaneous horizontal+vertical line clears for combo bonuses.
gameSpec.first_5s_script: Grid visible, three shapes in tray, score at top. First piece dragged to grid corner.
